items.title: UPQODE SEO/AEO proposal needs decision
items.summary: Val from UPQODE clarified the SEO/AEO proposal: Google Ads management fee excludes ad spend ($1k/month minimum), content strategy allows Will to write high-level vision pieces with UPQODE optimizing, and project covers SEO/AEO/GEO for AI citation.
items.actionNeeded: Review clarifications and approve or request changes to UPQODE's SEO/AEO proposal.

items.title: Launch call with 2 Market Media today 4pm
items.summary: Launch call scheduled for today at 4pm EST with 2 Market Media. Contract has been signed and invoice sent via Stripe. No prep needed but both contract and invoice must be completed before the call.
items.actionNeeded: Attend 4pm launch call and confirm invoice payment is complete.

items.title: Cancel HYROS webhook software
items.summary: Will forwarded a HYROS notification about a disabled webhook subscription and requested cancellation of the software.
items.actionNeeded: Cancel HYROS software subscription as requested.

items.title: Olha out June 15-23, Oleh covering
items.summary: UPQODE's Olha Hutsman will be on vacation June 15-23. Oleh Andrusyshyn will handle requests during her absence.
items.actionNeeded: Note coverage change for UPQODE communications June 15-23.
